title: Support filter image by reference to the image name

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude*, *QiWang19* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
needs an integration test or two/ else lgtm
ditto @baude's comment.  LGTM once new tests are provided.
@QiWang19 and I just did a lot of rework on this one.  She will be pushing a new PR along with tests.
Needs to update RELEASE_NOTES.md with changes
Nevermind the noise, no need to hit the release notes doc
@rhatdan added tests. Ready to be merged.
